professional_standard_verdict.reason: All 48 unit artifacts, six review panels, approved Vellum assets, governing records, and deterministic derivatives were directly inspected. All four carried blockers satisfy their recorded closure tests. Every critical dimension reaches at least PROFESSIONAL; no critical dimension was averaged upward.

immutable_cut_verification.head: bb6db9f89a0ea124bd92f45f5d84eaba0219d3f3
immutable_cut_verification.reason: The reviewed dirty artifacts are frozen by explicit SHA-256 values independent of Git state.
immutable_cut_verification.hash_result: All 59 packet and unit hashes checked above matched.
immutable_cut_verification.derivative_result: All 12 face crops and all 12 exact-96px images reproduced pixel-exactly in memory from their declared master hashes and derivation parameters.
immutable_cut_verification.visual_harness_panels: P001-P006 all matched their declared hashes.

contract_coverage.criterion: Exactly twelve named Phase 2 units
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Manifest cut and all visual boards contain Korath, Veyra, Cashmere, Pilfer, Nyxa, Creep, Knoll, Quillith, Kett, Luna, Malachor, and Sable exactly once.

contract_coverage.criterion: One definitive full-body master per unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Twelve distinct master PNGs were directly inspected and hash-verified.

contract_coverage.criterion: Three materially distinct rough silhouette options per unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve rough triptychs visibly contain three alternatives with changed stance, massing, prop relationship, or body architecture.

contract_coverage.criterion: Explicit art-primary and secondary trait channels
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The calibration bible and manifest assign channels for all units; the masters visibly preserve dominant versus subordinate channels.

contract_coverage.criterion: All 22 traits and six combat roles covered
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The frozen coverage matrix enumerates all 22 traits and Tank, Mage, Assassin, Support, Marksman, and Brawler; role-grouped boards visually corroborate coverage.

contract_coverage.criterion: Gameplay role and recognizable hook preserved
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Each master visibly communicates the documented tank, ranged, support, assassin, mage, or brawler hook through body plan, posture, and dominant prop/anatomy.

contract_coverage.criterion: Peak-condition fighter age/body policy
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Humanlike units read as combat-capable adults; nonhuman and explicit horror lanes are documented and visually dangerous rather than vulnerable.

contract_coverage.criterion: Female lane requirements and deliberate-horror exception
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna read as adult, lean, toned, feminine combatants; Nyxa reads as a batlike temporal predator before ordinary age.

contract_coverage.criterion: Armor and protection appear only where justified
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Frontline durability is anatomical or industrial; non-frontliners are not forced into generic fantasy armor.

contract_coverage.criterion: Ten-field survival-psychology records
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve records contain wound, want, fear, strategy, distortion, emotion, contradiction, face, pose, and forbidden-read fields.

contract_coverage.criterion: Psychology visible in face and posture
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Same-master face crops and full-body masters provide visible eye focus, brow or aperture tension, mouth or nonhuman mechanism, head angle, and supporting posture for every unit.

contract_coverage.criterion: Villainous or frightening without universal generic anger
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The batch distributes shame, possession, acquisition, opportunism, feral delight, dissociation, bureaucratic predation, punitive control, grievance, manipulation, entitlement, and cold certainty.

contract_coverage.criterion: One dominant prop or anatomical idea
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Each master has one controlling read: yoke, clamp, ledger, siphon hand, time-bow, blade ring, stamp/receipt, slate, fist, ligament, flesh clamp, or rifle.

contract_coverage.criterion: Supernatural cost visibly embodied
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Calcification, fused shell, tax-script, chemical mismatch, temporal aging, erased face, eyelid scars, burned nerves, debt-bone fist, split gaze, debtor tissue/clock, and citation scar are visible.

contract_coverage.criterion: No anatomy, hand, or prop integration failures
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Full-resolution masters show traceable limbs, contact, load paths, and integrated dominant props/anatomy without a material failure.

contract_coverage.criterion: No roster convergence into one costume, body, face, palette, prop, or demon family
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Master and 96px comparison boards show distinct body plans, scales, poses, faces, dominant ideas, and role silhouettes.

contract_coverage.criterion: Dry, grounded Vellum-relative finish
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The approved hard-matte Vellum comparison shows materially comparable dry detail without shiny BiRefNet, porcelain, or glossy gacha treatment.

contract_coverage.criterion: Same-master exact-96px readability
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve exact derivatives are pixel-exact deterministic containments of their declared masters and retain role and dominant identity.

contract_coverage.criterion: Four Round 4 carried closure tests
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Veyra, Knoll, Kett, and Malachor each satisfy the specific rough/master/face/96px closure condition detailed below.

contract_coverage.criterion: Immutable hash and derivative provenance
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All named packet, comparison, Vellum, and 48 unit-asset hashes matched; all 24 derivatives reproduced pixel-exactly.

Veyra.observed_evidence: Selected C rough shows a forward-leaning open lateral crescent on two braced legs. The master advances left-to-right with asymmetric shell jaws and target-directed tips. The exact 96px derivative retains the open sideways C and lunging legs.
Veyra.comparative_evidence: Unlike an egg, armadillo ball, or passive shield, the contour is open, directional, leg-driven, and visibly closing on a target.
Veyra.closure_condition: Master, selected C rough, and exact 96px must read as an actively lunging open sideways C-shaped living clamp before passive enclosure alternatives.

Knoll.observed_evidence: Selected B rough, master, and exact 96px show a palm-length pear-handled stamp in contact with one long pale curling receipt. The hands remain close to the paper and no long shaft or hard support appears.
Knoll.comparative_evidence: The flexible pale strip, small handle, and downward press do not present a hammer, anvil, table, block, staff, or cane silhouette.
Knoll.closure_condition: All three required views must prioritize a small office stamp contacting one long flexible receipt and eliminate the forbidden tool/furniture reads.

Kett.observed_evidence: The face crop shows grievance in the compressed brows and fixed eyes, restraint in the held jaw, and anticipated relief in an asymmetric one-corner tooth-bearing near-grin. The master and 96px image preserve one dominant fist and a committed forward line.
Kett.comparative_evidence: The expression is more specific than a uniform scowl or mindless rage face because the mouth asymmetry introduces involuntary relief while the eyes remain aggrieved.
Kett.closure_condition: Face must combine grievance, restraint, and one-corner anticipated relief while the fist remains the sole dominant attack idea.

Malachor.observed_evidence: In the master and face crop, the head pitches and turns down-right, pupils sit toward the same lower-right action vector, and the open demanding mouth addresses the clamp target. The clamp occupies that lower-right endpoint.
Malachor.comparative_evidence: The head/eye axis no longer forms frontal viewer contact; it converges with the attached clamp rather than the camera.
Malachor.closure_condition: Head, pupils, and demand expression must visibly track the lower-right clamp target instead of staring frontally.

findings.claim: The visual-harness run has one internal source-hash labeling inconsistency, although every captured panel and reviewed artifact independently verifies.
findings.exact_evidence: outputs/visual_debug/vdh_runs/phase2-real-unit-calibration-1fafb3e920/run-manifest.json labels metadata.runtime_provenance.source as phase2_calibration_manifest.json while supplying cc84f8..., the hash of phase2_review_evidence_manifest.json. Panel hashes P001-P006 still match their files.
findings.impact: An automated consumer trusting that single metadata pair could misidentify the provenance document; direct cut integrity and the visual verdict are unaffected because the actual files, assets, panels, and derivatives were independently verified.
findings.falsification: Align the runtime_provenance source path with the cc84f8... review-manifest hash, or replace the hash with 4174c7... for the calibration manifest, then regenerate and verify the run manifest.

rejection_case.case: A demanding reviewer could argue that some secondary trait costs and subtle facial contradictions are clearer in full-resolution crops and records than at 96px, and that several humanoid costumes remain dark and materially adjacent.
rejection_case.reason: The contract requires role and dominant identity at exact 96px, not every facial or secondary-trait detail. Those subtleties have direct same-master face and full-master evidence, while the comparison boards show materially different body plans, dominant props, silhouettes, and emotion families.

excellence_gap: Several PROFESSIONAL faces rely on restrained micro-expression rather than the immediate emotional specificity achieved by the strongest Nyxa, Pilfer, and Creep reads.
The human roster remains heavily concentrated in charcoal, brown, and distressed dark tailoring; broader controlled color authorship would raise memorability without violating Vellum.
Knoll's stamp and receipt pass at exact size but have less surplus legibility than the strongest silhouettes.
A category-leading packet would add equal-scale neighbor-specific diagnostic comparisons without making prose carry any of the distinction.
weak_proof: The visual-harness statement 'evidence failures: 0' proves packet completeness, not semantic quality.
Manifest assertions and embedded historical pass labels are not acceptance evidence and were not used as verdict authority.
Hashes prove identity and immutability, not professional quality.
The 96px overview boards are useful comparisons but do not replace inspection of each native 96px derivative.
Psychology prose cannot rescue a missing visual read; ratings were based on the face crops and masters.
missed_detection_causes: Dense overview boards can conceal small eye, mouth, contact, and pupil-direction defects.
Reading psychology prose before looking at the crop can bias an assessor toward seeing the intended emotion.
A deterministic derivative validator can pass even when the source master has a weak silhouette.
Hash-valid metadata can still pair the wrong source label and hash, as the visual-harness provenance inconsistency demonstrates.

strongest_counterargument.claim: Knoll's tiny stamp remains marginal at exact 96px and Malachor's pupil shift is subtle enough that a skeptical viewer might initially question both closures.
strongest_counterargument.resolution: The challenge does not survive full required-view comparison. Knoll retains the pale flexible receipt, small contact knob, and absence of every forbidden tool silhouette; Malachor's head, pupils, mouth, and clamp share the lower-right vector across master and crop.

unknowns.unknown: No live in-game deployment, animation, card framing, or runtime VFX was supplied.
unknowns.reason: Those outputs are explicitly outside this concept-art phase.

unknowns.unknown: The private live Google design document was not independently opened.
unknowns.reason: The user restricted this seat to the sole neutral packet, whose frozen gameplay identities and criteria controlled the review.

unknowns.unknown: Final user approval is not established by this seat.
unknowns.reason: READY is the independent Board-seat readiness recommendation; user approval remains a separate authority.
